description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a light green exterior. The front features a covered balcony with black railings and large sliding glass doors that open into a living area. Windows are rectangular and asymmetrically placed, providing natural light to various rooms. The house has a minimalist design with clean lines and a simple color palette. The main entryway is located beneath the balcony, sheltered by the overhanging upper floor. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements for the balcony and windows.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, light green walls, black railings, and large rectangular windows. The front features a covered balcony and a sheltered entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and side of the house, highlighting the covered balcony with black railings, large sliding glass doors, and several windows.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the solid green wall with minimal windows and a partial view of the balcony and living area.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid green wall with two rectangular windows and no visible entry points or balconies.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the house, featuring three rectangular windows and a glimpse into the interior through the windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered entryway beneath balcony with large sliding glass doors and minimal decorative elements
